items.name: kanban-driven-agent
items.description: Kanban-driven Agent is a self-operating Kanban board where tasks move through the stages Backlog, In Progress, Review, and Shipped. New todos can be created with a title and optional description or acceptance criteria. The agent processes tasks step by step, provides logs for each ticket, and allows shipped changes to be reverted when needed.
